save_favorites_desc: Create an account to save your favorite places.
onboarding_1_subtitle: Discover the most breathtaking destinations across India with verified safety information tailored for international travelers.
onboarding_2_subtitle: Every destination is curated and verified. Get accurate entry fees, timings, and essential visitor guidelines.
onboarding_3_subtitle: Personalized suggestions based on your interests, location, and travel preferences for the perfect Indian journey.
onboarding_4_subtitle: Navigate effortlessly with built-in maps, distance calculations, and turn-by-turn directions.
onboarding_5_subtitle: Create your traveler profile, save favorite places, and get recommendations that match your unique travel style.
exchange_rate_notice: Rates are indicative and may differ from banks or card providers.
itinerary_intro: A simple day-by-day plan based on places available in the app.
no_places_city: No more places available for this city.
ai_assistant_description: Soon you will be able to ask for personalized India travel guidance.
toolkit_subtitle: Practical tools for a safer and easier India trip
trusted_companion: Your safe and trusted companion for exploring the wonders of India.
unlock_experience: Sign in to unlock the full experience
terms_agreement:
By continuing, you agree to our Terms of Service
and Privacy Policy
sign_in_failed: Sign in failed. Please try again.
confirm_email_message: We sent a confirmation link to {}. Confirm your email, then sign in.
confirmation_sent: Confirmation email sent. Check your inbox.
account_not_confirmed: Your email is not confirmed yet. Check your inbox or resend the confirmation.
sign_in_before_profile: Please sign in before completing your travel profile.
profile_intro: Tell us a little about yourself so UniSafeX can personalize your trip.
sign_out_message: Your saved profile will remain available when you sign in again.
travel_profile_guest: Sign in to save your details, places and travel preferences.
identity_sign_in: Sign in to view or edit your saved travel identity.
private_identity_notice: These details are private to your signed-in UniSafeX account and are not shown on the main Profile screen.
find_hotels_subtitle: Choose a booking partner and search stays in India.
search_flights_subtitle: Choose a booking partner and compare routes to India.
booking_partner_notice: You choose the booking partner. Live API booking will be added later.
saved_empty_description: Tap the bookmark on a place to keep it in your travel shortlist.
report_problem_subtitle: Open the UniSafeX GitHub issue tracker
action_unavailable: This action is not available here.
booking_hero_subtitle: Choose your dates and preferred booking partner. Live availability will appear here after integration.
hotels_priority_subtitle: Priority booking experience for stays across India
flights_compare_subtitle: Compare international and domestic travel partners
booking_inside_app: UniSafeX will keep search, traveler details and booking management inside the app when partner APIs are active.
hotel_search_subtitle: Search hotels with your dates and guest preferences.
flight_search_subtitle: Compare routes to India and domestic connections.
saved_offline_description: Save a destination from its details page for quick local access.
saved_online_description: Tap the bookmark on a destination to keep it here.
toolkit_hero_description: Plan confidently, understand local essentials, and keep important travel tools close at hand.
trip_planner_description: Build a practical multi-day city itinerary.
currency_description: Live conversion across available world currencies.
phrase_book_description: Essential English to Hindi travel phrases.
ai_description: Ask about safety, fees, timings and itineraries.
help_description: Find answers, contact support, or access India’s emergency and tourist helplines.
faq_profile_question: Why is my profile not saving?
faq_profile_answer: Confirm your email and sign in first. Profile updates require an active Supabase session. Keep the app open until the saved confirmation appears.
faq_distance_answer: UniSafeX calculates straight-line distance from your live GPS or chosen starting location to each destination coordinate.
faq_currency_answer: Rates are reference values. Your bank, card or exchange counter may apply a different rate and additional fees.
faq_booking_question: Can I book hotels and flights now?
faq_booking_answer: Booking search forms are available, but live inventory and checkout require approved partner API integrations.
mission_description: UniSafeX helps international travelers explore India with practical destination details, safety guidance, nearby discovery and useful travel tools in one place.
app_provides_description: Tourism discovery, travel planning, destination safety scores, live reference currency conversion, local phrases, saved places, location-based distances and booking previews.
data_safety_description: Tourism information is stored in the UniSafeX database. Distances are calculated from coordinates. Safety scores and AI-style answers are guidance only and cannot guarantee personal safety or replace official advice.
emergency_reminder_description: For emergencies in India call 112. Tourist helpline: 1363. Always verify opening times, fees and travel conditions with official sources before visiting.
